## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I avoided committing generated files, local saves, IDE metadata, or build output.
- [ ] I confirmed new assets or third-party files have compatible licensing.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or public APIs changed.
